name: Boosted Hand Signals

abilities.name: Communication Breakdown
abilities.text: When an enemy model removes a friendly Assault marker, if there are two or fewer friendly Assault markers in play, a model with this ability may drain a (soulstone). If it does not, replace this crew card with Hand Signals. At the end of the turn, if there are 0 friendly Assault markers in play, this card must be replaced with Hand Signals.

abilities.name: Planned Attack
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model declares an action, if it is within 2" of a friendly Assault marker, it may add any one suit to its duel.

actions.name: A New Front
actions.effects: This model may select an ally within 2". Make an Assault marker within range and then place this model and the selected ally into base contact with the made marker.

extraction_notes: Costs_and_restrictions for 'A New Front' includes tome suit and soulstone icon followed by 'A', indicating this is an Action with those requirements
The drain soulstone icon in Communication Breakdown rendered as (soulstone)
Card replaces itself with 'Hand Signals' under certain conditions
